<thought>
I am at cell row 02 column B facing right (`>`). The cell in front of me, row 02 column C, contains lava (`L`), which is deadly. Moving forward is not safe. I need to avoid the lava. 

My goal is at row 04 column D. To find a safe path, I will turn downwards by rotating 90 degrees clockwise to face down (`v`). That way, I can move forward safely on row 03 column B.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am at cell row 02 column B and I am facing down (`v`). The goal is at row 04 column D. Moving forward will lead me to cell (03, B), which is a safe cell (floor). I should move forward to progress closer to the goal.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at cell row 03 column B and I am facing down (`v`). The goal is at row 04 column D. Moving forward leads to row 04 column B which is safe, but to reach the goal I need to move right later. First I will move forward to get closer to the goal.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at cell row 04 column B facing down (`v`). The goal is at row 04 column D. The cell directly in front (row 05 column B) is a wall (`#`), so moving forward is blocked. I need to rotate to face right `>` to approach the goal at column D. From facing down to facing right, I should turn counter-clockwise once.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_ANTI_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am at cell row 04 column B, facing right (`>`). The goal `O` is at row 04 column D. The cell in front of me (row 04 column C) contains lava `L`, which I must avoid. To reach the goal safely, I should rotate to face up (`^`) and then move forward through safe cells, navigating around the lava.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_ANTI_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>

</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>

I need to change my orientation to avoid stepping into lava. Turning clockwise will make me face down (which is a wall), turning counter-clockwise will make me face up, which leads to safe cells that I can navigate through towards the goal.

GIRA_ANTI_HORARIO

<thought>
I am at cell row 04 column B, facing up (`^`). The goal is at row 04 column D. The direct path forward (up) has lava at cell 02 column C, which is dangerous. To reach the goal at column D safely, I should turn right to face right (`>`), then move forward toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>

To avoid the lava, I should consider turning either up or down. Turning up will give me access to a safer path since moving backward would lead to walls or lava as well. I will rotate clockwise to face down (v) to explore that direction.

GIRA_HORARIO

</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
